We also understand, false declarations will be in breach of the Code of Integrity under Rule 175(1)(i)(h) 
of the General Financial Rule for which for which a bidder or its successors can be debarred for up two 
years as per Rule 151 (iii) of the General Financial Rules along with such other actions as may be 
permissible under law. 
I/ We certify that Transportation, Insurance, Installation, Commissioning, Training & other after Sales 
Service Support like AMC/CMC, etc., not claimed as a Local Value Addition.  
Thanking You.
